LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_No7_Anchor.label: Anchor Resonance
LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_No7_Anchor.description: #0's stabilizing anchor effect calms No.7's venom neural circuits.
LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_No7_Softened.label: Softened
LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_No7_Softened.description: No.26's presence makes No.7 drop its guard.
LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_No13_Calculated.label: Calculated Calm
LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_No13_Calculated.description: #0's presence shifts No.13's tactical instincts from attack to defense.
LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_CoinFaces.label: Coin Resonance
LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_CoinFaces.description: Kill instinct and survival instinct mirror each other; the two poles' resonance enhances both.
LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_No13_Restraint.label: Restraint
LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_No13_Restraint.description: No.26 makes No.13 rein in its attack impulses.
LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_No42_StarGuidance.label: Star Guidance
LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_No42_StarGuidance.description: #0's resonance points the way for No.42.
LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_No88_SweetNuzzle.label: Sweet Nuzzle
LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_No88_SweetNuzzle.description: No.26 makes No.88 more playful and outgoing.
LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_No45_HearthWarmth.label: Hearth Warmth
LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_No45_HearthWarmth.description: No.45's steady body heat accelerates wound healing for nearby allies.
LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_No88_FirePhobia.label: Fire Phobia
LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_No26_Guardian.label: Guardian's Vigil
LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_No26_Guardian.description: No.26's protective instinct is fully awakened while guarding #0.
LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_No26_Protected.label: Protected
LanguageData.TITAN_Bond_No26_Protected.description: #0 feels the pure devotion of No.26's guard, body and mind at peace.
